title: NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has released the official Project Specialist Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding an MBA or equivalent qualification can apply online up to 01 June 2026. Age limit details are available in the official notification. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Specialist: MBA or equivalent from a reputed and recognized University or Institution with a minimum of 5 years of experience, including at least 2 years in executing Programme/Project Management Consultancy assignments.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated remuneration based on experience, educational qualification and overall suitability. Salary will be commensurate based upon experience and last drawn salary.
salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration based on experience, educational qualification and overall suitability. Salary will be commensurate based upon experience and last drawn salary.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
